---
title: Quantifying the Eddy Feedback and the Persistence of the Zonal Index in an
  Idealized Atmospheric Model
pagetitle: 2009-12-1-Chen2009 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2009
author: Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 66, 3707--3720, doi:10.1175/2009JAS3165.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb, 2009: Quantifying the Eddy Feedback
  and the Persistence of the Zonal Index in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal
  of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 66, 3707--3720, doi:10.1175/2009JAS3165.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2009JAS3165.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Quantifying the Eddy Feedback and the Persistence of the Zonal Index in an Idealized Atmospheric Model

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2009*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb, 2009: Quantifying the Eddy Feedback and the Persistence of the Zonal Index in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 66, 3707--3720, doi:10.1175/2009JAS3165.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2009JAS3165.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
